privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes the real-world Natural Earth 110m populated places dataset, downloaded during environment setup. The target city 'Shanghai' exists in the dataset and its target attribute 'pop_max' corresponds to the 'POP_MAX' column lowercased by ogr2ogr upon PostGIS import. The required target value (28543210), layer name (ne:ne_populated_places), and output artifact paths exactly match the explicitly verified constraints in the task description and export_result.sh logic.
